race.comment: MEDICAL (2) drew an outside box and was game in defeat when only a neck from the winner Ms. Florence in second(17.09) at this track. One of the leading chances. CRACKERJACK GREG (3) jumps from box 3 for the first time after placing latest at Warrnambool (22.69) in a Bottom Up - Maiden. Can feature again. RIGHT PATH (7) had a tough draw to overcome and was game in defeat when only 0.8 lengths from Two Star Mikado in second (17.13) at this track. Racing well and deserves a win. ASTON JOSEPH (1) cannot be dismissed although new to this venue.
